dict.string: "This" uses AppleScript to automate apps on your Mac when you ask it to perform tasks.
"This" can read and create calendar events when you ask it to manage your schedule.
"This" can look up contacts when you ask it to help with people-related tasks.
"This" may access your Desktop folder to help with file management tasks.
"This" may access your Documents folder to help with file management tasks.
"This" may access your Downloads folder to help with file management tasks.
"This" uses your microphone for invoke-key voice input.
"This" can read and create reminders when you ask it to manage your tasks.
"This" converts your speech to text so you can dictate prompts hands-free.
